default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Assist Jason Gong in setting up Default tool integration with Attio CRM for lead form submissions.](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Successfully configured API call to create/assert person records in Attio from Default lead form submissions](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Discussed best practices for storing lead form data (person attributes, lists, or deals)](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Explored Attio's approach to deal creation and pipeline stages, differing from traditional HubSpot model](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

## Topics

### API Integration Setup

  - [Used PUT request to assert/create person records: `https://api.attio.com/v2/objects/people/records?match_on=email_addresses`](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Resolved JSON formatting issues in Default's interface](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Final working structure:](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
    ``` json
    {
      "data": {
        "values": {
          "email_addresses": [
            {"value": "jason+test@growthx.ai"}
          ]
        }
      }
    }
    ```
  - [Attio auto-creates company records based on email domain](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Lead Form Data Storage Options

  - [Person attributes: Attach submission data directly to person record](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Lists: Create a person-based list (e.g., "Lead Form Submissions") with custom attributes](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Deals: Create a deal for each submission, attaching form data](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

### Attio's Deal Creation Approach

  - [Creates deals early in the funnel (e.g., on account creation or lead form submission)](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Uses deal stages for qualification and progression](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
      - [Centralized data storage](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
      - [Improved funnel reporting and drop-off analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### Comparison to HubSpot Model

  - [HubSpot uses separate Lead object for early-stage prospects](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Attio's approach allows for earlier deal creation and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Potential challenge: Assigning deal values to early-stage leads](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Decide on preferred method for storing lead form data in Attio (person, list, or deal)](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Implement chosen data storage method via Attio API](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Consider adjusting deal creation timing or using filters for more accurate funnel reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Consult with incoming RevOps consultant for further optimization of Attio setup](https://fathom.video/share/Bzhsf4SDKj4b7X7xxcFcMe6xL-8GXjst?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

action_items.description: Create "Lead Form Submissions" list in Attio; add columns for form data (e.g. email, name, company)
